---
title: "Interrupting Relapse Drift"
format: html
---

## Interrupting Relapse Drift

During recovery, people do specific things that help keep them abstinent. In the relapse drift analogy,<!--reference relapse_drift_reading.qmd--> these activities can be called *"mooring lines."*

It is important to understand what you are doing to stay abstinent. These mooring lines should be listed in a specific, clear, and measurable way.

These activities act like the “ropes” that hold recovery in place and prevent relapse drift from happening unnoticed.

Complete this chart to list and track the behaviors that support your recovery.

![](https://github.com/jjcurtin/aud_support/blob/main/modules/images/mooring.jpg?raw=true){fig-align="center"}

### Guidelines for Completing the Chart

-   Identify four or five specific behaviors that help you stay abstinent (e.g., working out for 20 minutes, three times a week)

-   Include measurable activities such as:

    -   Exercise\
    -   Therapist and group appointments\
    -   Scheduling structured activities\
    -   12-Step meetings\
    -   Eating patterns

-   Do not list attitudes — they are harder to measure than behaviors

-   Note specific people or places that are known triggers and should be avoided

-   Place a checkmark next to each mooring line that is secure

-   Record the date for each check

**If two or more items cannot be checked, it indicates that relapse drift may be occurring.**

### Mooring Line Behaviors

| Behavior | Date 1 | Date 2 | Date 3 | Date 4 | Date 5 |
|----------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|
|          |        |        |        |        |        |
|          |        |        |        |        |        |
|          |        |        |        |        |        |
|          |        |        |        |        |        |
|          |        |        |        |        |        |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### I Am Avoiding

| Trigger | Date 1 | Date 2 | Date 3 | Date 4 | Date 5 |
|---------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|
|         |        |        |        |        |        |
|         |        |        |        |        |        |
